creator: jason@mastaler.com
text:
I can't get xmps to play any of my mpeg files sucessfully.  As soon as
it loads the file, the program segfaults.  Here is an example of the
errors I'm getting:

aguirre:~> xmps
SMPEG Codec (MPEG-1) Loaded...
X11 Video Renderer Loaded...
Fatal error '_waitq_remove: Not in queue' at line ? in file /usr/src/lib/libc_r/uthread/uthread_priority_que       ue.c (errno = ?)
zsh: abort (core dumped)  xmps

Other times, the player crashes and the Gnome bug report submitter
pops up.  I'm unsure if this is a bug in xmps or Gnome.
